---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that stays within the project's governance boundaries
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What user need or project gap does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Boundary Check

Explain how this avoids:

- dependence loops
- authority claims
- overclaiming what the system can know

## Notes

Add examples, tradeoffs, or implementation ideas if helpful.
